Correction: The section should be titled "Daily Reminders" and include a description of the daily reminder functionality.

Label: R1
Issue: Does not specify the access level for administrators
Correction: The system shall have three levels of access: one for teachers and assistants, one for administrators, and one for super administrators.

Label: R7
Issue: Does not specify password complexity requirements
Correction: The password shall contain 6 to 8 alphanumeric characters, including at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.

Label: R18
Issue: Does not specify the format for immunization dates
Correction: A child’s record shall contain the dates that their required immunizations were received in the format MM/DD/YYYY.

Label: R23
Issue: Does not specify the billing cycle
Correction: Parents shall be billed $90 at the end of each month for a single child enrolled.

Label: R30
Issue: Does not specify the format for the Customer Directory Report
Correction: A Customer Directory Report shall list the customers alphabetically by last name and include their address and phone number in a tabular format.

Label: R39
Issue: Does not specify the format for recording user edits
Correction: When a user edits an account, their user ID along with the date, time, and a description of the change shall be recorded in the database in the format: UserID, Date (MM/DD/YYYY), Time (HH:MM), Description.

Label: R48
Issue: Does not specify compatibility with other browsers
Correction: The system shall have a Web-based interface that works with Internet Explorer, Netscape Navigator, and Google Chrome.

Label: R50
Issue: Does not specify the performance criteria for user requests
Correction: The system shall respond to all user requests within 20 seconds under normal operating conditions.
